scripts.typecheck: for config in packages/core/tsconfig.json packages/plugin-bun/tsconfig.json packages/plugin-vitest/tsconfig.json packages/store-postgres/tsconfig.json packages/store-sqlite/tsconfig.json packages/store-supabase/tsconfig.json packages/store-turso/tsconfig.json; do echo "==> $config"; tsc -p "$config" --noEmit || exit 1; done
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:types && bun run docs:build
scripts.publish:dry: bun run build && for dir in packages/*/; do [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] && [ "$dir" != 'packages/docs/' ] && echo "=== $dir ===" && (cd "$dir" && bun publish --dry-run --access public); done
scripts.jsr:dry: for dir in packages/*/; do [ -f "${dir}jsr.json" ] && echo "=== $dir ===" && (cd "$dir" && bun x jsr publish --dry-run --allow-dirty); done
